message.content:
@startuml
title Update PractitionerRole

actor "Integrating application user" as User
rectangle "Integrating application" as IntegratingApp
rectangle "<FHIR API> HPI" as HPI
rectangle "HPI Practitioner Role database" as HPIDatabase

User -> IntegratingApp: Update PractitionerRole
using hpi-practitionerrole-id

IntegratingApp -> HPI: PUT<Endpoint> /PractitionerRole/[hpi-practitionerrole-id]

HPI -> HPI: Validate[]

HPI -> HPIDatabase: Request

HPIDatabase -> HPI: HTTP 200 response

IntegratingApp -> User: HTTP 200 response

@enduml
